content.en:
"Ye Tian, I want you to die!"

Lanyue Dao Ancestor roared angrily, and his aura shattered the chaotic void within a radius of hundreds of millions of miles.

But he could only roar angrily, and couldn't do anything else at all.

Could it be that the real body descended on the battlefield ruins of the Quasi-Dao Realm?

In that case, under the backlash, his strength is estimated to be only comparable to the previous Dao Ancestor incarnation, and maybe he will be killed by Ye Tian and become a joke of chaos.

After all, there has never been a Dao Ancestor who has been killed by the True Monarch in the chaos, even if the Dao Ancestor who is seriously injured and dying, it is not something that the True Monarch can kill, but the Dao Ancestor who is suppressed and eaten by the Quasi-Dao Realm is really weak to the extreme.

He didn't want to be a joke like that, so naturally he wouldn't die in the quasi-Dao realm.

Moreover, even if Ye Tian didn't kill him, he didn't know how many Dao Ancestors wanted to kill him.

Between Dao Ancestor and Dao Ancestor, as long as the difference in strength is not too big, it is difficult to distinguish between life and death.

For example, according to the division of the Divine Heaven Realm, he is a relatively weak One-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but even the top One-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestor can't kill him, and even some of the Two-Tier Heavenly Dao Ancestors can only hit him hard, if he wants to escape, it will be difficult for the Two-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor to hunt him down.

After all, Daozu has too many hole cards, and there are too many life-saving means.

The Dao Ancestor who was really sure to kill him completely was at least the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, so as to ensure that he would not be able to escape.

A few more months will pass.

Ye Tian found the incarnation of Mengyue Dao Ancestor, this is a female Dao Ancestor, but Ye Tian didn't care about men and women at all, and killed the incarnation of Mengyue Dao Ancestor with great strength.

A year later, Ye Tian found the incarnation of Fengbo Daozu again, and the other party was originally going to hide, but he was reluctant to keep appearing by various opportunities, but he was still led out by chance and found by Ye Tian, thus killing him in one fell swoop.

At this point, the incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors who had previously hunted Ye Tian had all fallen and died.

And Ye Tian's prestige is even greater, and he even has the title of Dao Ancestor incarnated killer.

But Ye Tian knew very well that those top Dao Ancestor incarnations were currently attacking various places of opportunity, and he didn't have time to pay attention to him at all, otherwise any top Dao Ancestor incarnation would not be able to escape.

Therefore, after Ye Tian killed the incarnation of Fengbo Dao Ancestor, he kept a low profile and was no longer so high-profile.

And with the passage of time, the remnants of the battlefield were almost developed, and many sect forces were excavated by countless True Monarchs and a large number of Dao Ancestor incarnations.

Ye Tian also received countless benefits, and even obtained a lot of inheritances, Dao weapons, innate origin things, various exercises and secret techniques, and so on.

Originally, in the chaos, treasures such as Dao weapons were almost rare, and they were all treasures that only the top True Ancestors had, but now even some True Monarchs can have Dao weapons, although they can't use Dao weapons, but they don't yearn for Dao weapons.

It can be said that Taoist tools are almost common.

The current net worth of some powerful True Monarchs is not comparable to the entire net worth of a down-and-out Dao Ancestor before, and the world is changing too fast for Dao Ancestors to sigh.

And in the chaos, Dao Ancestors continued to wake up, rushing to the Quasi-Dao Realm, making the Quasi-Dao Realm more and more lively, and even new top forces were involved.

Before, some of the top forces in the chaos who were far away didn't care about the birth of a Dao Realm at all, but now that they heard about the situation in the Quasi-Dao Realm, they couldn't help it.

For example, one of the four transcendent forces, the Star Horn Clan!

The Starhorn Beast Clan is a Chaos Life Clan, and the members of this clan are born with Chaos Life, and they are born with the cultivation of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and with a little cultivation, they can become the True Monarch of the True Spirit Realm.

Basically, the Starhorn Clan will be able to become the True Ancestor of the Great Dao Realm when they reach adulthood!

What is this concept?

Other races have spent countless years, and only a few top-notch beings have the hope of becoming true ancestors!

For example, the Void Heaven One Bloodline, countless disciples, among which the real leader can only become a true ancestor by luck, but the Starhorn Clan can become a true ancestor when they become adults, which is the transcendent power with a powerful bloodline.

In terms of strength, the Void Sky Pulse is far from being a Star Horn Clan.

However, the Starhorn clan is so powerful that it can't occupy Chaos, because of the number of races, coupled with the fact that the other major forces unite against the four transcendent forces, there is room for survival.

In the past, the four transcendent forces didn't do much at all, they all lived in their own clan land, and only a few clansmen would go out to practice.

But this time, the Starhorn Clan also became interested in the Dao Realm and wanted to participate.

If it was an ordinary force, the top forces would not pay attention to it at all, but the Starhorn clan was too strong, and these forces naturally did not dare to stop it.

Outside the boundary.

One after another, huge star-horned beasts stepped on the chaotic vitality, and soon came to the edge of the Quasi-Dao Realm.

There are a total of thousands of star-horned beasts that arrived this time, and six of them are at the level of Dao Ancestors, divided by the strength of the Divine Heaven Realm, these six-headed star-horned beasts are not ordinary Dao Ancestors, but Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and they are at the same level as the Void Heaven Dao Ancestors.

casually sent out six Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, this is the essence of the Star Horn Beast Clan.

In addition to the six Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, there are dozens of True Ancestors, and the rest are all at the True Monarch level.

"This is the newly born Quasi-Dao Realm, I heard that countless True Monarchs of the entire Chaos have entered it!"

A True Monarch's ultimate star-horned beast looked at the Quasi-Dao Realm and spoke.

This True Monarch is a descendant of a Dao Ancestor of the Starhorn Clan, and a descendant of the Royal Family, his bloodline is incomparably noble, far surpassing other Starhorn Beasts, and he is a Starhorn Beast genius who is expected to become a Dao Ancestor - Tuolong.

"Your Highness, it is said that many ruins have been born in this quasi-Dao realm, it seems that some kind of domain realm ruins, even the Dao Ancestor incarnation has ended!" said another True Monarch.

"Hmph, no matter what the ruins are, our Starhorn Clan is here, and all the treasures inside should belong to our Starhorn Clan!" Tuolong said domineeringly.

"Don't underestimate the geniuses of other forces, some geniuses are strong enough to match you!"

The one who spoke was a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Starhorn.

Tuolong can not put other geniuses in his eyes, and even not ordinary Dao Ancestors, but he still has great respect for the Dao Ancestors of his own clan, so he naturally did not dare to object, and nodded again and again: "Yes, Luohai Great Ancestor!"

Great Ancestor is the honorific title of the Star Beast Horn Clan for the Dao Ancestors!

And although Luohai Great Ancestor is not Tuolong's ancestor, he is also one of the high-level members of the Starhorn Clan.

Suddenly.

The chaotic void rippled, and the group walked over again.

Seeing these people, Tuolong's expression changed, and the six Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Starhorn Beast Clan were also dignified.
